mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, bank_process_id, posted_date, period_type, outcome, billing_start, billing_end, created_at, created_by FROM bank_process_accounting_posted WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND posted_date BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate}

SELECT id, tenant_id, bank_process_id, posted_date, period_type, outcome, billing_start, billing_end, created_at, created_by FROM bank_process_accounting_posted WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND bank_process_id = #{bankProcessId} AND posted_date = #{postedDate} AND period_type = #{periodType} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bank_process_accounting_posted ( tenant_id, bank_process_id, posted_date, period_type, outcome, billing_start, billing_end, created_by ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{bankProcessId}, #{postedDate}, #{periodType}, #{outcome}, #{billingStart}, #{billingEnd}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM transactions t INNER JOIN bank_process_accounting_posted p ON p.id = t.bank_process_posted_id WHERE t.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND p.bank_process_id = #{bankProcessId} AND p.outcome = 'POSTED' AND t.description LIKE 'COMPENSATION %'
